daily.next_focus: Continue broadened public-email sourcing across health-adjacent, employer, apartment, chamber, and wellness channels.
Source more high-quality employer/HR and apartment decision-maker emails.
Keep senior/caregiver/home-care as top phone/form follow-up priority.
Source more senior/caregiver public emails; phone/form follow-up for high-fit no-email senior living and home-care targets.
Continue senior/caregiver sourcing; begin human phone/form follow-up for high-fit no-email senior homes.
Continue senior/caregiver sourcing; staged Zoho dry-run/backfill pending dedupe approval.
Recovery run completed at full cap after enriching verified senior/caregiver public-email contacts and applying dedupe exclusions; route prior-batch positive materials request to operator follow-up.

latest_batch_summary.note: Recipient-level details are not exposed in the public dashboard. See channel_mix_latest for category breakdown. 2026-05-01 was a recovery run after the morning's tracker showed no New rows with public emails; verified public-email contacts were enriched and deduped against prior partial-run sends and three excluded senior-resource organizations.

channel_scorecard.note: Both positive replies to date came from this channel, including a materials-requested signal. Highest reply yield per send. Continue prioritizing sourcing here.
Sustained engagement with one recycle-later signal. Public-email coverage remains the bottleneck; phone/form follow-up recommended for high-fit no-email targets.
Largest tier-1 volume but no replies yet. Test a hospice oral-comfort resource angle and a shorter subject line variant before scaling further.
One reviewing-partnerships neutral. Hold at limited test volume; do not crowd out tier-1 sourcing capacity.
Single advertising/referral neutral. Continue deprioritization unless a partner-fit referral pathway emerges.
Volume too low to score. Pause unless decision-maker public emails can be sourced cleanly.
Only signal so far is a hard bounce. Suppress address; do not expand without verified-email sourcing.
No replies. Keep deprioritized; not a senior-decision-maker channel.
No replies. Keep deprioritized; off-thesis for the seminar offer.

experiments.title: Shorter subject line
experiments.hypothesis: Trimming the subject to under 45 characters lifts open and reply rate in tier-1 senior channels.
experiments.channel: Senior Living / Assisted, Caregiver / Senior Resource
experiments.next_step: Author A/B variant and reserve next 6 tier-1 sends for the shorter subject.

experiments.title: Materials-first senior follow-up
experiments.hypothesis: Leading the follow-up with the seminar materials packet (no second ask) converts the prior positive materials request into a scheduled session.
experiments.next_step: Operator sends materials packet today; CC ops only after positive engagement, per guardrail.

experiments.title: Hospice oral-comfort resource angle
experiments.hypothesis: A clinical resource framing (oral comfort for end-of-life patients) outperforms generic seminar pitch in hospice/home-health.
experiments.next_step: Draft resource-led variant; reserve next 4 hospice sends for this angle.

experiments.title: Phone/form follow-up for no-email high-fit
experiments.hypothesis: High-fit senior-living and home-care orgs without a public email convert via phone or contact-form follow-up at meaningfully higher rates than waiting for email enrichment.
experiments.channel: Senior Living / Assisted, Home Care / Hospice / Health
experiments.next_step: Operator works the no-email shortlist daily; log outcomes back to the Sheet.

experiments.title: Reply-rate baseline lock
experiments.hypothesis: Holding subject and body constant for 20 sends per tier-1 channel produces a stable reply-rate baseline to compare future copy tests against.
experiments.next_step: Define control copy; lock variant rotation cadence after EXP-01 and EXP-03 complete.

queue_health.sourcing_goal_next_run: Source at least 18 verified senior/caregiver/home-health public emails before tomorrow's 08:30 PT run to clear the recovery-run pattern.
warnings: Tracker showed zero New rows with public emails this morning before recovery enrichment.
Three senior-resource organizations excluded by dedupe in latest batch; widen the org pool before reusing the same shortlist.
Capacity at full cap masks that the buffer is depleted; sourcing must lead, not follow, the run.

human_followups.action: Send approved senior concerns materials packet to the prior-scan positive materials request.
human_followups.note: Identity redacted in public mirror; tracked by reply ID in private Sheet.

human_followups.action: Phone or contact-form follow-up for high-fit no-email senior homes from this week's shortlist.
Phone or contact-form follow-up for high-fit no-email home-care and hospice targets.
human_followups.note: Pair with EXP-03 framing where appropriate.

human_followups.action: Monitor first positive reply for movement; nudge only if no response within five business days.

guardrail_status.rule: Daily cap of 12 one-to-one new emails per weekday
guardrail_status.evidence: Latest run sent 12 of 12; no day in the loaded window exceeded the cap.

guardrail_status.rule: Initial outreach sent only from ip@clovedds.com
guardrail_status.evidence: Sender locked in task config; no alternate sender observed in the window.

guardrail_status.rule: No CC and no BCC on initial outreach
No auto-reply to interested prospects; operator drafts each reply
guardrail_status.evidence: Both positive signals routed to human follow-up; zero automated replies sent.

guardrail_status.rule: Suppress bounces, opt-outs, and not-interested permanently
guardrail_status.evidence: One bounce in window; address suppressed and not retried.

guardrail_status.rule: Public verified emails only; never invent or guess address patterns
guardrail_status.evidence: Latest run rebuilt the queue from verified public sources after the morning tracker showed no New rows.

guardrail_status.rule: Google Sheet remains source of truth; Zoho writeback staged
guardrail_status.evidence: Zoho writeback held pending staged dedupe and dry-run approval.

zoho.status: Connected; writeback documented but live CRM record creation held pending staged dedupe/dry-run approval.

guardrails: Maximum 12 one-to-one new emails per weekday
Initial outreach sent only from ip@clovedds.com
No CC or BCC on initial outreach
aryaan@clovedds.com is CC'd only after a positive reply or scheduling/ops handoff

Suppress bounces, opt-outs, and not-interested permanently
Public verified emails only; never invent or guess email patterns
Google Sheet is the source of truth; Zoho writeback remains staged
next_actions: Operator follow-up on the prior-scan positive materials request (senior concerns / caregiver resource) using the approved seminar materials packet.
Continue senior/caregiver public-email sourcing to keep a healthy New-row buffer ahead of each weekday run and avoid recovery enrichments.
Phone/form follow-up for high-fit senior-living and home-care orgs without a public email.
Approve dedupe + dry-run plan before enabling Zoho live writeback.

tier_1: Senior living / assisted / memory care / independent living
Home care / home health / hospice / VNA
Caregiver resource centers and senior placement
Adult day programs and senior centers
deprioritized: Generic chambers, churches, schools/PTAs, and community centers

google_ads_insights.title: Google Ads Multi-Office Watch
google_ads_insights.subtitle: Direct linked account reporting across 16 office account(s) for the last 30 days. Recommendations are dashboard-only; no live Google Ads changes are pushed.
google_ads_insights.automation_status: Direct linked account reporting is active for every connected office account (16 in this refresh). Recommendations are dashboard-only and require explicit operator approval before any live change.

coverage.office_label_policy: Office labels are the only identifier shown publicly. Manager and child customer IDs are never exposed in the public mirror; office mapping is pending for any office not yet linked under the manager.
coverage.next_step: Continue private manager-account consolidation and keep office mapping internal.

risk_summary.note: High-risk spend is the share of 30-day spend coming from campaigns flagged for tightening or pausing. Prioritize search-query review and negative sweeps before any budget restoration.

recommended_budget_shift.guardrail: Do not shift budget until call/booking quality is verified per office; then move in small weekly increments.

recommended_actions: Tighten or pause first: Oxnard Riverpark - JZ-Search-Riverpark, Sherman Oaks - JZ-Search-Sherman Oaks, Sherman Oaks - JZ-PMAX - reduce budget/bids, sweep negatives, and verify tracking before any reload.

Protect and replicate: Camarillo - Insurance-Performance Max-15/4/26, Puri Dentistry - Insurance-Performance Max 27-3-2026, Ayur - Problem - Perio - hold budget, copy winning structure into the next office where lead quality is confirmed.
Audit zero-conversion search and PMax campaigns with no phone calls before any budget restoration.
Use the office leaderboard and high-risk spend share to choose where call/quality audits go this week.
High-risk spend currently at $37866.34 (42.06% of 30-day spend across 16 reporting offices).
operator_notes: Direct linked account reporting is active for every connected office in this refresh; manager-account consolidation remains a private/internal step.

No live Google Ads changes are made from this dashboard. The currently exposed connector supports reporting and limited writebacks (offline conversions / customer lists), not direct campaign, budget, bid, negative-keyword, or ad mutations.
Office labels are the only identifier shown publicly. Manager and child customer IDs, dashed and undashed, are intentionally never exposed.

account_linking_status.metrics_source_summary: Direct linked account reporting is active for 16 office account(s). Manager-account consolidation and any private hierarchy details remain internal.
account_linking_status.new_manager_status: Manager-account enumeration is intentionally not surfaced publicly. The dashboard shows only the office accounts that are currently returning campaign metrics.
account_linking_status.api_limitation: The connector enumerates linked office accounts and pulls their campaign metrics directly. Cross-account manager rollups and customer-client hierarchy details are private.
account_linking_status.privacy_note: Public dashboard shows account state by office label only. Manager and child customer IDs, dashed and undashed, are never exposed.
account_linking_status.public_state: Reporting is live for 16 linked office account(s) in this refresh, including the recently added Riverpark AI, Santa Monica, and Santa Monica AI accounts.
account_linking_status.manager_metrics_note: Manager-level rollups are computed privately. Each office account is reported as its own row.
account_linking_status.connector_limitation_note: Reporting is supported. Direct campaign/budget/bid/negative/ad mutations are not supported by the currently exposed connector. Live ad changes require a mutation-capable Google Ads tool/scope and explicit approval.
next_actions: Keep direct linked account reporting as the public source.
Wire a mutation-capable Google Ads tool/scope before executing any live campaign, budget, bid, or negative changes from this dashboard.
Continue keeping manager-account consolidation and any customer IDs private/internal.
account_linking_status.no_ids_disclaimer: Manager account IDs, customer IDs, and account labels are intentionally never displayed in the public mirror.

api_writeback_status.read_status: Campaign reporting is supported through the connected Google Ads API for the linked office accounts.
api_writeback_status.write_status: The currently exposed connector supports reporting and limited writebacks such as offline conversions/customer lists, but not direct campaign, budget, bid, negative keyword, or ad edits from this dashboard.
api_writeback_status.required_for_live_changes: To execute campaign changes automatically, add a Google Ads mutation tool/scope for campaign criteria, budgets, ad group criteria, ads, and campaign status changes, then require explicit approval before writes.

_sanitization.policy: Public dashboard exposes only aggregate metrics, category/status summaries, redacted operator action items, operating guardrails, and aggregated Google Ads campaign and ad-group metrics. Individual prospect emails, prospect names, reply sender names/addresses, free-text reply summaries, the operations Google Sheet ID and URL, recipient-level batch details, private operations-repo commit hashes, and Google Ads manager/customer account identifiers are removed.
removed_fields: next_actions free-text references to specific prospects
daily[].next_focus references to specific prospect names
human_followups[] redacted to action and channel only; identities live in private Sheet
google_ads_insights account_label raw text (replaced with mapping-pending placeholder)
b2b_reply_detail timeline excludes sender names, emails, organizations, phone numbers, and raw reply text
google_ads_keyword_focus is keyword-ideas API output only; no customer/manager IDs, no search-term reports

b2b_reply_detail.title: B2B reply detail
b2b_reply_detail.privacy_note: Public view is sanitized: no sender names, emails, organizations, phone numbers, or raw reply text.

reply_timeline.public_theme: Forwarded internally to a better program owner
reply_timeline.suggested_next_action_public: Monitor for the forwarded contact; if no response, send a light follow-up.
Recycle in roughly 90 days with a note referencing their timing constraint.

reply_timeline.public_theme: Community channel suggested alternate referral path
reply_timeline.suggested_next_action_public: Consider OASIS/older-adult program call; avoid endorsement ask unless paid advertising is desired.
Suppress address and source alternate public contact before any future outreach.
Monitor and send light follow-up after 5 business days if no reply.
Prepare human-approved one-page senior oral-health resource and send as follow-up.

what_is_working: Senior/caregiver and caregiver-resource channels produced the clearest positive signal.
Fitness/wellness outreach produced a warm partnership-review signal worth a follow-up.
Community/faith channels can surface referral paths, but endorsement asks are weaker than program-specific older-adult channels.
next_copy_tests: Lead senior/caregiver copy with a concrete one-page oral-health resource plus optional short educational session.
For wellness/fitness, frame as Dental Wellness 101 for members, not a generic partnership ask.
For community organizations, ask for the correct older-adult program contact instead of endorsement.

google_ads_keyword_focus.title: Keyword and theme focus
google_ads_keyword_focus.source_note: Themes derived from the multi-office Google Ads connector refresh. Search-term-level data is intentionally kept private; only protect/expand vs tighten/pause themes are shown publicly.

focus_keywords.keyword: Spanish search and clear local intent variants
focus_keywords.focus_reason: Where conversion density is strong, protect budget and replicate the winning structure by office.

focus_keywords.keyword: Dentical / insurance when conversions are present
focus_keywords.focus_reason: Some Dentical and insurance campaigns produce efficient leads, but performance varies sharply by office and must stay isolated.

focus_keywords.keyword: Wisdom teeth and emergency intent with verified lead quality
focus_keywords.focus_reason: High-intent specialty campaigns can work when conversion tracking and downstream quality are confirmed.

focus_keywords.keyword: AI office DNM campaigns with low CPA
focus_keywords.focus_reason: Several AI-labeled DNM accounts show efficient CPA; monitor quality and cautiously scale only if leads are real appointments.

negative_or_isolate_candidates.keyword: High-CPC general office search with zero-conversion spend
negative_or_isolate_candidates.why_review_or_negative: General location search repeatedly burns spend on expensive clicks without tracked conversions.

negative_or_isolate_candidates.keyword: PMax emergency/general campaigns with weak conversion density
negative_or_isolate_candidates.why_review_or_negative: Performance Max can absorb budget broadly; reduce until assets, locations, and conversion tracking are audited.
Specialty clicks are expensive and should remain constrained unless call/form quality proves value.

negative_or_isolate_candidates.keyword: Campaigns with no phone calls despite high spend
negative_or_isolate_candidates.why_review_or_negative: No call volume suggests tracking, landing-page, or intent mismatch that should be fixed before more budget.

api_writeback_capability.status: Reporting is supported across all linked office accounts. The exposed connector does not support direct campaign, budget, bid, negative-keyword, or ad mutations from this dashboard.
can_write_supported: Offline conversion uploads via the Google Ads API.
Customer-list (audience) updates via the Google Ads API.
Reporting reads across all linked office accounts.
api_writeback_capability.required_for_live_changes: Add a Google Ads mutation tool/scope that can write campaign criteria, budgets, ad-group criteria, ads, and campaign status. Then require explicit per-change operator approval before any write.
